meta.name: BFI-10 Big Five Inventory-10
meta.description: The BFI-10 is an ultra-brief version of the Big Five Inventory (BFI-44), using just 10 items to rapidly assess five personality dimensions: Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Neuroticism, and Openness. Each dimension consists of 2 items (1 regular, 1 reverse-scored), suitable for time-constrained research.
meta.author: Rammstedt & John (2007)
meta.reference: Rammstedt B, John OP. Measuring personality in one minute or less: A 10-item short version of the Big Five Inventory in English and German. J Res Pers. 2007;41(1):203-212.
meta.instruction: How well do the following statements describe your personality? I see myself as someone who...

questions.text: ...is original, comes up with new ideas

extraversion.label: Low
extraversion.description: Low extraversion; tends to be introverted, quiet, and prefers solitude.

extraversion.label: Average
extraversion.description: Moderate extraversion; balanced between social interaction and solitude.

extraversion.label: High
extraversion.description: High extraversion; outgoing, sociable, and energized by group activities.

agreeableness.label: Low
agreeableness.description: Low agreeableness; tends toward independent thinking, competitiveness, and critical analysis.

agreeableness.label: Average
agreeableness.description: Moderate agreeableness; balanced between cooperation and self-assertion.

agreeableness.label: High
agreeableness.description: High agreeableness; compassionate, cooperative, and trusting.

conscientiousness.label: Low
conscientiousness.description: Low conscientiousness; tends to be flexible and spontaneous, less focused on plans and details.

conscientiousness.label: Average
conscientiousness.description: Moderate conscientiousness; balanced between organization and flexibility.

conscientiousness.label: High
conscientiousness.description: High conscientiousness; reliable, self-disciplined, organized, and goal-oriented.

neuroticism.label: Low (Emotionally Stable)
neuroticism.description: Low neuroticism; emotionally stable, not easily anxious or upset.

neuroticism.label: Average
neuroticism.description: Moderate neuroticism; generally manages emotions well.

neuroticism.label: High
neuroticism.description: High neuroticism; more prone to anxiety, tension, and mood swings.

openness.label: Low
openness.description: Low openness; prefers tradition, practicality, and familiar experiences.

openness.label: Average
openness.description: Moderate openness; balanced between exploring new things and maintaining stability.

openness.label: High
openness.description: High openness; curious, creative, and receptive to new ideas and experiences.
